titleNative: ずっこけナイト　ドンデラマンチャ
synonyms: Don Quijote y los Cuentos De La Mancha
synopsis: Don Quixote, that infinitely popular character, travels the countryside battling windmills and attempting to win the love of his Dulcinea.

title: Pucca 3
synopsis: In the third season of Pucca Goh-Rong faces a new rivalry with new local restaurant titled Dong King Restaurant. Ring Ring, a local 12-year-old fashion star, who appeared in previous seasons grows a love interest to Garu, while also being revealed to be the daughter of Dong King and works alongside him and his servants against Pucca and Dong King.

title: PES: Peace Eco Smile - Drive your Heart

synopsis: The film premiered at the AnimeparTy festival, which was held on May 18 and 19 in Shanghai. Hidekazu Ohara directed the video, and idol group Sweety (Sengoku Collection theme song performance) performed the voices of the NaSuBi and performed the music.

title: Shen Yi Jiu Xiaojie
synopsis: The animation tells the story of the modern, glamorous, genius doctor Jun Jiu who accidentally fell to her death in an elixir auction and ends up in the body of Miss Jiu from the past. Miss Jiu was originally the direct daughter of the Jun family, one of the two great families in the imperial city. Because of the death of both parents, the family sent her to the Jun family in Fengluo City. Jun Jiu inherited all the memories of Miss Jiu and vowed revenge. In this world of immortal cultivation, she first cleansed her muscles and marrow through her amazing medical skills to improve her cultivation talent, and then made good friends and paved the way carefully. Watch how Jun Jiu kills her enemies, cleanses the Feng Luo family, and begins her legendary story of a generation of heavenly daughters. (Source: QQ)

title: Shitasaki kara Koi
synonyms: Love from the Tip of the Tongue
synopsis: The story revolves around the "cakeverse," in which people are categorized as "forks" and "cakes." Tatsunari is a "fork," who has lost his taste for people, except for "cakes." Naruya is a "cake," who is specifically scrumptious for "forks." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Pen to Wappa to Jijitsukon
synonyms: A Pen, Handcuffs, and a Common-Law Marriage
synopsis: Forty-year-old detective Eiji Kirisame has found maybe the strangest witness of his life: a silent high school girl named Tsugumi Kuchinashi who was at the scene of the crime. Her statements mostly consist of shoddy doodles on a drawing pad, but Eiji is no stranger to piecing together the truth from limited evidence. He'll take every page seriously if it might help solve the case. But why does the last page say... "Will you marry me?! " (Source: Yen Press)

title: Game Sekai Tensei <Dankatsu>: Gamer wa [Dungeon Shuukatsu no Susume] wo <Hajime kara> Play Suru
titleRomaji: Game Sekai Tensei <Dankatsu>: Gamer wa [Dungeon Shuukatsu no Susume] wo <Hajime kara> Play Suru
titleNative: ゲーム世界転生〈ダン活〉～ゲーマーは【ダンジョン就活のススメ】を〈はじめから〉プレイする～
synonyms: Reincarnation in the Game World Dan-Katsu: Game Addict Plays "Encouragement for Job Hunting in Dungeons" From a "New Game"
synopsis: Dan-Katsu is a legendary role-playing game that allows you to play more than 1021 classes and has more than 400 possible endings! The more we delve into it, the more we discover new ways to enjoy it, new objects… A certain gamer (player name: Zephyrus) is reincarnated in the world of Dan-Katsu, of which he becomes the main character. Overjoyed, he joins the Labyrinth Academy, the place where the main story takes place. He quickly obtains the 'Hero' class, the best in the game, but discovers that the 'Muscle Warrior', a class considered 'for fun' where he comes from, is perceived in this world as a good class?! That the most difficult dungeons have never been conquered?! In other words… he will be able to enjoy this world as if it were a new game! Determined to show everyone what a good class is, he brings together classmates, allows his reserved childhood friend to become an Alchemist, transforms a selfish Princess into a Saint… Now that he has gathered powerful classes around from him

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.

title: Starlight Scramble
titleNative: スターライトスクランブル 恋愛候補生
synopsis: In the near future, during the colony war, a girl was save by a little boy when a space station was attacked by terrorists in which the girl lost her parents. A few years later, the girl joined her grandfather's military school. There she met a young man that looked similar to the boy who saved her... but just when she was prepared to enter the school compound, she sees a 'terrorist' lurking around which is actually a terrorist demo under the school command and so the story begins... (Source: AniDB)

title: Wuxia Shitu Yu Shier Zhan Ji
titleRomaji: Wuxia Shitu Yu Shier Zhan Ji
synonyms: The Limitless Apostle and the Twelve Battle Maidens
synopsis: He is recognized as the strongest existence, standing at the top of the world. Wealth? fame? Power? It was not worth mentioning in his eyes. The strongest apostles fled and startled the human continent for the reason: “Don’t get me wrong! Lao Zi came to look for his future wife! ”Yes, it’s a story about the strongest single apostle ever looking for a wife.

title: Eiyuu Banka Koushi-den
synopsis: Born in the Chinese state of Lu in 551 B.C., Confucius is raised by his mother after his father dies when he is only three. He marries at 19 and enters the service of the local nobility. At 32, he becomes tutor to the Prince of Lu's children, eventually becoming a politician at 51. His career peaks are the roles of Lu's justice minister and eventually prime minister. The land prospers for four years, but Confucius grows disenchanted with court intrigues. For the following 12 years, he wanders the neighboring states, offering advice to their rulers. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Ruriiro Princess
synopsis: High school girl Ruri is dragged into a battle over the fate of the Pulsean Moon when the princess Leila sends assassins to dispense with her. Ruri's lover, Toru, is wounded protecting her, and Ruri must leave the real world behind and journey to the Pulsean Moon to save him. Based on the manga in Omajinai Comic by Mito Orihara, who also wrote the theme song. (Source: AnimeVice)

title: The Shower
synopsis: A little girl always plays on the stepping stones in the brook. A shy little boy hovers around her unable to ask her that he wishes to be alone. Suddenly, it rains and they seek shelter together, which brings them closer. However, the little boy has a secret. Sonagi is an animated adaptation of a book called “Rain Shower” by the author Hwang Sun-won, the short story was written while he lived as a refugee with his family during the Korean War.

title: Yakusoku no Utsuwa: Arita no Hatsukoi
titleRomaji: Yakusoku no Utsuwa: Arita no Hatsukoi
titleNative: 約束の器　有田の初恋
synopsis: The anime is set in the town of Arita, and will be a youth story highlighting the scenery of Arita. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
titleRomaji: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
titleNative: 悠久の愚者アズリーの、賢者のすゝめ
synonyms: The Eternal Fool's Words of Wisdom: A Pawsitively Fantastic Adventure
The Eternal Fool's Words of Wisdom
synopsis: A couple thousand years of solitude would wear down any young man—that is, anyone except Asley, an eternally youthful and eternally foolish sorcerer. After all, he has man's best friend...er, familiar, to keep him company. When his Level 100 canine companion Pochi demands that he get some fresh air for the first time in two centuries, Asley sets out to reintegrate into society and test his magic mettle. His mission? Dropping several unglamorous titles from his repertoire and restoring his good (okay, decent) name. A brand-new world and fresh adventures await Asley after his many years of hermitage. Perhaps he'll lend Pochi a hand to place first in the mysterious Familiar Feud. Or maybe he'll lose all vestiges of dignity and turn tail. Whichever comes first! No matter what, Asley has great evil to fight, a big world to save, and even a little growing up to do...that is, if he can endure Pochi's “friendly advice” along the way! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Jing Wei Wu Jian
synopsis: Adapted from the JJWXC novel ‘Jing Wei Qing Shang’ by Qing Jun Mo Xiao/Please Don’t Laugh, this is a romantic story about two incredible young women. Legend says that the land was once separated by the Luo river. To the south was the agricultural Wei kingdom, and to the north, the nomadic Jing kingdom. Agula, a Princess of the Jing kingdom, had to become a Prince since birth so that her loving parents could stay together. Nangong Jingnu, a Princess of the Wei kingdom, was meant to live a carefree life, but the political struggles of the court made it necessary for her to follow the footsteps of her father. After a war turned Agula into an orphan, she went into hiding for ten years, honing her skills in order to infiltrate the Wei kingdom as a sycophantic official and bring chaos to the world. However, due to a series of events, she was appointed to be Nangong Jingnu’s husband at the Qionglin banquet…

title: Mu Wang Zhi Wang: Qi Lin Jue
titleRomaji: Mu Wang Zhi Wang: Qi Lin Jue
synonyms: Great King of the Grave: Secrets of the Qilin
synopsis: Luo Wu Zi helped Li Si Xiu to build the mound of Qin Shi Huang; the first emperor who united China. His disciples continued to build and safeguard the royal tombstone. In between lies the appearance of the Nine Great Tombstones, also known as Great King of the Graves. For thousands of years, the tombs were never robbed. The outsiders regard these guardians of the tombs like the Tomb Sect. After the death of Luo Wu Zi, the position of Grave King is transferred to his eldest disciple, Mu Rong Xiu.
